---
title: "404 Page not found"
comments: false
---

You've wandered off the map. Maybe you followed a broken link, typed a URL wrong, or I have made an error.

If you believe there is a bug please contact me at [1jamesthompson1@gmail.com](mailto:1jamesthompson1@gmail.com)

**Here are some places that *should* exist:**

- [Home](/) — start here
- [Posts](/posts.qmd) — long-form essays and ramblings
- [Short Forms](/shorts.qmd) — micro-posts under 100 words
- [About Me](/about-me.qmd) — more about me
